title: Content engineering path handout (modules 13–15)
subtitle: AI image, video, music, and rights check – use this as a mini-campaign checklist.
modalityChecklist: Image – when you need a hero visual, presentation frame, or social post.
Video – when you need movement, a process, or a 5–10 second scene from an existing image.
Music or sound – when you need mood, background, or short sound effects.
When unsure, start with one hero image and only then continue to video or music.
imagePromptTemplate: Brief: goal [Awareness / Engagement / Conversion], audience [who], platform [where]. Create a hero image: [object and action], environment [context], style [style], ratio [1:1 / 16:9 / 9:16]. Brand: colors [X], tone [friendly / professional / premium]. No text in the image unless needed.
videoPromptTemplate: Turn this hero image into a 5–10 second video scene. Motion: [what moves]. Camera: [slow zoom / side movement / static frame]. Keep the same style, colors, and main object. Do not change brand elements.
musicPromptTemplate: Create a 30–60 second background music brief: mood [calm / energetic / premium], tempo [slow / medium / fast], instruments [2–3], usage [video / podcast / ad]. No vocals if words would distract.
rightsChecklist: Check the tool's usage rights: is commercial use allowed?
Do not use other people's logos, faces, or trademarks without permission.
If the content will be public, save the prompt, tool, date, and license link.
If an image or sound resembles a real person or work, choose a safer alternative.
deliveryChecklist: At least one prompt and a generated result or link.
If you did the full path – V1/V2 change and why you chose the final.
reflectionSummary: Within 24–48 hours, use one prompt in a real project. Write down what worked, what you adjusted in V2, and which rights check you performed.
nextPageIntro: The Content path is complete when you have not just a good result, but also a prompt, brief, rights check, and clear first use.
footerText: Prompt Anatomy – prompt structure training. © Course material.
